_meta.description: Python chart rendering recipes for NanoBanana: deterministic, safe, matplotlib-based chart generation templates.

recipes.pythonTemplate:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
ax.bar($categories, $values, color=$colors)
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel($yLabel)
ax.set_title($title)
plt.xticks(rotation=$xRotation)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
ax.barh($categories, $values, color=$colors)
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel($yLabel)
ax.set_title($title)
ax.invert_yaxis()
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
x = np.arange(len($categories))
n = len($series)
width = 0.8 / n
for i, (s, v) in enumerate(zip($series, $values)):
    ax.bar(x + i * width - (n - 1) * width / 2, v, width, label=s, color=$colors[i % len($colors)])
ax.set_xticks(x)
ax.set_xticklabels($categories, rotation=$xRotation)
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel($yLabel)
ax.set_title($title)
ax.legend()
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
bottom = np.zeros(len($categories))
for i, (s, v) in enumerate(zip($series, $values)):
    ax.bar($categories, v, bottom=bottom, label=s, color=$colors[i % len($colors)])
    bottom += np.array(v)
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel($yLabel)
ax.set_title($title)
ax.legend()
plt.xticks(rotation=$xRotation)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
vals = np.array($values, dtype=float)
totals = vals.sum(axis=0)
totals[totals == 0] = 1
pcts = vals / totals * 100
bottom = np.zeros(len($categories))
for i, s in enumerate($series):
    ax.bar($categories, pcts[i], bottom=bottom, label=s, color=$colors[i % len($colors)])
    bottom += pcts[i]
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel('Percentage')
ax.set_title($title)
ax.set_ylim(0, 100)
ax.legend()
plt.xticks(rotation=$xRotation)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
vals = np.array($values)
colors_mapped = [$colors[0] if v >= 0 else $colors[1] for v in vals]
ax.barh($categories, vals, color=colors_mapped)
ax.axvline(0, color='black', linewidth=0.8)
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_title($title)
ax.invert_yaxis()
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
ax.bar($categories, $values, color=$colors, edgecolor='white', linewidth=0.5)
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel($yLabel)
ax.set_title($title)
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
plt.xticks(rotation=$xRotation)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
x = range(len($categories))
ax.plot(x, $values, color=$colors[0], linewidth=2)
ax.fill_between(x, $values, alpha=0.3, color=$colors[0])
ax.set_xticks(x)
ax.set_xticklabels($categories, rotation=$xRotation)
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel($yLabel)
ax.set_title($title)
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
ax.step($categories, $values, where='mid', color=$colors[0], linewidth=2)
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel($yLabel)
ax.set_title($title)
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
plt.xticks(rotation=$xRotation)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(3, 0.8))
ax.plot(range(len($values)), $values, color=$colors[0], linewidth=1.2)
ax.fill_between(range(len($values)), $values, alpha=0.15, color=$colors[0])
ax.axis('off')
ax.margins(x=0, y=0.1)
plt.tight_layout(pad=0)
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight', transparent=True)
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
ax.plot($categories, $values, color=$colors[0], linewidth=2, marker='o', markersize=6, markerfacecolor='white', markeredgecolor=$colors[0], markeredgewidth=2)
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel($yLabel)
ax.set_title($title)
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
plt.xticks(rotation=$xRotation)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
x = range(len($categories))
ax.fill_between(x, $values, alpha=0.5, color=$colors[0])
ax.plot(x, $values, color=$colors[0], linewidth=1.5)
ax.set_xticks(x)
ax.set_xticklabels($categories, rotation=$xRotation)
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel($yLabel)
ax.set_title($title)
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
x = range(len($categories))
ax.stackplot(x, *$values, labels=$series, colors=$colors[:len($series)], alpha=0.7)
ax.set_xticks(x)
ax.set_xticklabels($categories, rotation=$xRotation)
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel($yLabel)
ax.set_title($title)
ax.legend(loc='upper left')
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
vals = np.array($values, dtype=float)
totals = vals.sum(axis=0)
totals[totals == 0] = 1
pcts = vals / totals * 100
x = range(len($categories))
ax.stackplot(x, *pcts, labels=$series, colors=$colors[:len($series)], alpha=0.7)
ax.set_xticks(x)
ax.set_xticklabels($categories, rotation=$xRotation)
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel('Percentage')
ax.set_title($title)
ax.set_ylim(0, 100)
ax.legend(loc='upper left')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
x = range(len($categories))
ax.plot(x, $valuesUpper, color=$colors[0], linewidth=1.5, label=$labels[0] if $labels else 'Upper')
ax.plot(x, $valuesLower, color=$colors[1], linewidth=1.5, label=$labels[1] if $labels else 'Lower')
ax.fill_between(x, $valuesLower, $valuesUpper, alpha=0.25, color=$colors[0])
ax.set_xticks(x)
ax.set_xticklabels($categories, rotation=$xRotation)
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel($yLabel)
ax.set_title($title)
ax.legend()
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
wedges, texts, autotexts = ax.pie($values, labels=$categories, colors=$colors[:len($categories)], autopct='%1.1f%%', startangle=90)
for t in autotexts:
    t.set_fontsize(9)
ax.set_title($title)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
wedges, texts, autotexts = ax.pie($values, labels=$categories, colors=$colors[:len($categories)], autopct='%1.1f%%', startangle=90, pctdistance=0.8, wedgeprops=dict(width=0.4, edgecolor='white'))
for t in autotexts:
    t.set_fontsize(8)
ax.set_title($title)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
explode = [0.05] * len($categories)
if $explodeIndex is not None and $explodeIndex < len(explode):
    explode[$explodeIndex] = 0.15
wedges, texts, autotexts = ax.pie($values, labels=$categories, colors=$colors[:len($categories)], autopct='%1.1f%%', startangle=90, explode=explode)
for t in autotexts:
    t.set_fontsize(9)
ax.set_title($title)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
size = 0.3
outer_colors = $colors[:len($categoriesOuter)]
inner_colors = $colors[:len($categoriesInner)]
ax.pie($valuesOuter, radius=1, colors=outer_colors, labels=$categoriesOuter, wedgeprops=dict(width=size, edgecolor='white'), labeldistance=1.1)
ax.pie($valuesInner, radius=1 - size, colors=inner_colors, labels=$categoriesInner, wedgeprops=dict(width=size, edgecolor='white'), labeldistance=0.7, textprops={'fontsize': 8})
ax.set_title($title)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
ax.scatter($xValues, $yValues, color=$colors[0], alpha=0.7, edgecolors='white', linewidth=0.5)
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel($yLabel)
ax.set_title($title)
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
ax.scatter($xValues, $yValues, color=$colors[0], alpha=0.6, edgecolors='white', linewidth=0.5)
xs = np.array($xValues, dtype=float)
ys = np.array($yValues, dtype=float)
z = np.polyfit(xs, ys, $polyDegree if $polyDegree else 1)
p = np.poly1d(z)
x_line = np.linspace(xs.min(), xs.max(), 200)
ax.plot(x_line, p(x_line), color=$colors[1], linewidth=2, linestyle='--')
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel($yLabel)
ax.set_title($title)
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
sizes_scaled = np.array($sizes, dtype=float)
sizes_scaled = (sizes_scaled / sizes_scaled.max()) * 1000
ax.scatter($xValues, $yValues, s=sizes_scaled, color=$colors[0], alpha=0.5, edgecolors=$colors[0], linewidth=1)
if $labels:
    for i, lbl in enumerate($labels):
        ax.annotate(lbl, ($xValues[i], $yValues[i]), fontsize=7, ha='center')
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel($yLabel)
ax.set_title($title)
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
ax.plot($xValues, $yValues, color=$colors[0], linewidth=1.5, alpha=0.6)
ax.scatter($xValues, $yValues, color=$colors[0], s=40, zorder=5, edgecolors='white', linewidth=1)
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel($yLabel)
ax.set_title($title)
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
ax.hist($values, bins=$bins if $bins else 'auto', color=$colors[0], edgecolor='white', linewidth=0.8, alpha=0.8)
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel('Frequency')
ax.set_title($title)
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
from scipy.stats import gaussian_kde

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
data = np.array($values, dtype=float)
kde = gaussian_kde(data)
x_range = np.linspace(data.min() - data.std(), data.max() + data.std(), 300)
ax.plot(x_range, kde(x_range), color=$colors[0], linewidth=2)
ax.fill_between(x_range, kde(x_range), alpha=0.25, color=$colors[0])
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel('Density')
ax.set_title($title)
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
bp = ax.boxplot($values, labels=$groups, patch_artist=True, medianprops=dict(color='black', linewidth=1.5))
for i, patch in enumerate(bp['boxes']):
    patch.set_facecolor($colors[i % len($colors)])
    patch.set_alpha(0.7)
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel($yLabel)
ax.set_title($title)
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
parts = ax.violinplot($values, showmeans=True, showmedians=True)
for i, pc in enumerate(parts['bodies']):
    pc.set_facecolor($colors[i % len($colors)])
    pc.set_alpha(0.7)
ax.set_xticks(range(1, len($groups) + 1))
ax.set_xticklabels($groups)
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel($yLabel)
ax.set_title($title)
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
for i, (g, v) in enumerate(zip($groups, $values)):
    jitter = np.random.normal(0, 0.04, size=len(v))
    ax.scatter(np.full(len(v), i) + jitter, v, color=$colors[i % len($colors)], alpha=0.6, s=20, edgecolors='white', linewidth=0.3)
ax.set_xticks(range(len($groups)))
ax.set_xticklabels($groups)
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel($yLabel)
ax.set_title($title)
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
data = np.sort(np.array($values, dtype=float))
ecdf = np.arange(1, len(data) + 1) / len(data)
ax.step(data, ecdf, color=$colors[0], linewidth=2, where='post')
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel('Cumulative Probability')
ax.set_title($title)
ax.set_ylim(0, 1.05)
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
ax.bar($categories, $values, yerr=$errors, color=$colors[0], capsize=5, edgecolor='white', linewidth=0.5, error_kw=dict(ecolor='gray', linewidth=1.5))
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel($yLabel)
ax.set_title($title)
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
plt.xticks(rotation=$xRotation)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
ax.plot($xValues, $yValues, color=$colors[0], linewidth=2, label=$labels[0] if $labels else 'Mean')
ax.fill_between($xValues, $yLower, $yUpper, color=$colors[0], alpha=0.2, label='95% CI')
ax.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax.set_ylabel($yLabel)
ax.set_title($title)
ax.legend()
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
vals = np.array($values, dtype=float)
max_val = vals.max()
widths = vals / max_val
for i, (cat, w, v) in enumerate(zip($categories, widths, vals)):
    ax.barh(i, w, height=0.7, left=(1 - w) / 2, color=$colors[i % len($colors)], edgecolor='white')
    ax.text(0.5, i, f'{cat}: {v:,.0f}', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color='white')
ax.set_xlim(0, 1)
ax.set_yticks([])
ax.set_title($title)
ax.axis('off')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
data = np.array($matrix)
im = ax.imshow(data, cmap=$colormap if $colormap else 'Blues', aspect='auto')

ax.set_xticklabels($xLabels, rotation=$xRotation)

    for j in range(data.shape[1]):
        color = 'white' if data[i, j] > thresh else 'black'
        ax.text(j, i, f'{data[i, j]:.1f}', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8, color=color)

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
from scipy.cluster.hierarchy import dendrogram, linkage
from scipy.spatial.distance import pdist

fig = plt.figure(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
data = np.array($matrix, dtype=float)
row_link = linkage(pdist(data), method='ward')
col_link = linkage(pdist(data.T), method='ward')
row_order = dendrogram(row_link, no_plot=True)['leaves']
col_order = dendrogram(col_link, no_plot=True)['leaves']
ordered = data[row_order][:, col_order]
ax = fig.add_subplot(111)
im = ax.imshow(ordered, cmap=$colormap if $colormap else 'viridis', aspect='auto')
row_labels = [($yLabels)[i] for i in row_order]
col_labels = [($xLabels)[i] for i in col_order]
ax.set_xticks(range(len(col_labels)))
ax.set_xticklabels(col_labels, rotation=45, ha='right', fontsize=8)
ax.set_yticks(range(len(row_labels)))
ax.set_yticklabels(row_labels, fontsize=8)
ax.set_title($title)
plt.colorbar(im, ax=ax, shrink=0.8)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

for i in range(len($dates)):
    o, h, l, c = $open[i], $high[i], $low[i], $close[i]
    color = $colors[0] if c >= o else $colors[1]

step = max(1, len($dates) // 10)

ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(4, 1, figsize=($figWidth, 10), sharex=True)
data = np.array($values, dtype=float)
n = len(data)
period = $period
kernel = np.ones(period) / period
trend = np.convolve(data, kernel, mode='same')
detrended = data - trend
seasonal = np.zeros(n)
for i in range(period):
    seasonal[i::period] = np.nanmean(detrended[i::period])
residual = data - trend - seasonal
axes[0].plot(data, color=$colors[0], linewidth=1.5)
axes[0].set_ylabel('Observed')
axes[1].plot(trend, color=$colors[1] if len($colors) > 1 else $colors[0], linewidth=1.5)
axes[1].set_ylabel('Trend')
axes[2].plot(seasonal, color=$colors[2] if len($colors) > 2 else $colors[0], linewidth=1.5)
axes[2].set_ylabel('Seasonal')
axes[3].plot(residual, color=$colors[3] if len($colors) > 3 else $colors[0], linewidth=1, alpha=0.7)
axes[3].set_ylabel('Residual')
fig.suptitle($title)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight), subplot_kw=dict(polar=True))
inner_vals = np.array($valuesInner, dtype=float)
outer_vals = np.array($valuesOuter, dtype=float)
inner_total = inner_vals.sum()
outer_total = outer_vals.sum()
inner_angles = inner_vals / inner_total * 2 * np.pi
outer_angles = outer_vals / outer_total * 2 * np.pi
inner_starts = np.cumsum(np.concatenate([[0], inner_angles[:-1]]))
outer_starts = np.cumsum(np.concatenate([[0], outer_angles[:-1]]))
for i, (s, a) in enumerate(zip(inner_starts, inner_angles)):
    ax.bar(s + a / 2, 1, width=a, bottom=0.3, color=$colors[i % len($colors)], edgecolor='white', linewidth=1)
    if a > 0.2:
        ax.text(s + a / 2, 0.8, $labelsInner[i], ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold')
for i, (s, a) in enumerate(zip(outer_starts, outer_angles)):
    pidx = $parentMap[i] if $parentMap else i % len($colors)
    ax.bar(s + a / 2, 0.8, width=a, bottom=1.3, color=$colors[pidx % len($colors)], edgecolor='white', linewidth=1, alpha=0.7)
    if a > 0.15:
        ax.text(s + a / 2, 1.7, $labelsOuter[i], ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7)
ax.set_ylim(0, 2.5)
ax.axis('off')
ax.set_title($title, y=1.05)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
labels = $labels
values = np.array($values, dtype=float)
levels = $levels
max_level = max(levels)
for level in range(max_level + 1):
    items = [(i, labels[i], values[i]) for i in range(len(labels)) if levels[i] == level]
    total = sum(v for _, _, v in items)
    x_pos = 0
    for idx, lbl, val in items:
        width = val / total if total > 0 else 0
        color = $colors[idx % len($colors)]
        ax.barh(level, width, left=x_pos, height=0.8, color=color, edgecolor='white', linewidth=1)
        if width > 0.05:
            ax.text(x_pos + width / 2, level, lbl, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8, color='white', fontweight='bold')
        x_pos += width
ax.set_yticks(range(max_level + 1))
ax.set_yticklabels([f'Level {i}' for i in range(max_level + 1)])
ax.invert_yaxis()
ax.set_title($title)
ax.set_xlim(0, 1)
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
from matplotlib.patches import Wedge

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
min_val = $minVal
max_val = $maxVal
value = $value
thresholds = $thresholds if $thresholds else [max_val * 0.33, max_val * 0.66, max_val]
zone_colors = [$colors[2] if len($colors) > 2 else '#059669', $colors[3] if len($colors) > 3 else '#D97706', $colors[1]]
ranges_list = [min_val] + list(thresholds)
for i in range(len(ranges_list) - 1):
    start_angle = 180 - (ranges_list[i] - min_val) / (max_val - min_val) * 180
    end_angle = 180 - (ranges_list[i + 1] - min_val) / (max_val - min_val) * 180
    wedge = Wedge((0.5, 0), 0.4, end_angle, start_angle, width=0.12, facecolor=zone_colors[i % len(zone_colors)], edgecolor='white')
    ax.add_patch(wedge)
needle_angle = np.radians(180 - (value - min_val) / (max_val - min_val) * 180)
nx = 0.5 + 0.32 * np.cos(needle_angle)
ny = 0.32 * np.sin(needle_angle)
ax.annotate('', xy=(nx, ny), xytext=(0.5, 0), arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='black', lw=2.5))
ax.text(0.5, -0.08, f'{value:,.0f}', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=18, fontweight='bold')
ax.set_xlim(0, 1)
ax.set_ylim(-0.15, 0.5)
ax.set_aspect('equal')
ax.set_title($title, y=1.0)
ax.axis('off')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

cats = $categories
n = len(cats)
angles = np.linspace(0, 2 * np.pi, n, endpoint=False).tolist()
angles += angles[:1]
if isinstance($values[0], list):
    for i, (s, v) in enumerate(zip($series, $values)):
        vals = v + v[:1]
        ax.plot(angles, vals, 'o-', linewidth=2, label=s, color=$colors[i % len($colors)])
        ax.fill(angles, vals, alpha=0.1, color=$colors[i % len($colors)])
else:
    vals = list($values) + [$values[0]]
    ax.plot(angles, vals, 'o-', linewidth=2, color=$colors[0])
    ax.fill(angles, vals, alpha=0.2, color=$colors[0])
ax.set_xticks(angles[:-1])
ax.set_xticklabels(cats, fontsize=9)
ax.set_title($title, y=1.08)
if isinstance($values[0], list):
    ax.legend(loc='upper right', bbox_to_anchor=(1.3, 1.1))

ax2.set_ylabel($labels[1] if len($labels) > 1 else 'Line', color=$colors[1])
ax2.tick_params(axis='y', labelcolor=$colors[1])
ax1.set_xticks(x)
ax1.set_xticklabels($categories, rotation=$xRotation)
fig.suptitle($title)
lines1, labels1 = ax1.get_legend_handles_labels()
lines2, labels2 = ax2.get_legend_handles_labels()
ax1.legend(lines1 + lines2, labels1 + labels2, loc='upper left')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax1 = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
x = np.arange(len($categories))
ct = $chartTypes if $chartTypes else ['bar', 'line']
if ct[0] == 'bar':
    ax1.bar(x, $values1, color=$colors[0], alpha=0.7, label=$labels[0] if $labels else 'Series 1')
else:
    ax1.plot(x, $values1, color=$colors[0], linewidth=2, label=$labels[0] if $labels else 'Series 1')
ax1.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax1.set_ylabel($labels[0] if $labels else 'Left Axis', color=$colors[0])
ax1.tick_params(axis='y', labelcolor=$colors[0])
ax2 = ax1.twinx()
if ct[1] == 'bar':
    ax2.bar(x + 0.3, $values2, width=0.3, color=$colors[1], alpha=0.7, label=$labels[1] if len($labels) > 1 else 'Series 2')
else:
    ax2.plot(x, $values2, color=$colors[1], linewidth=2, marker='s', label=$labels[1] if len($labels) > 1 else 'Series 2')
ax2.set_ylabel($labels[1] if len($labels) > 1 else 'Right Axis', color=$colors[1])
ax2.tick_params(axis='y', labelcolor=$colors[1])
ax1.set_xticks(x)
ax1.set_xticklabels($categories, rotation=$xRotation)
fig.suptitle($title)
lines1, labels1 = ax1.get_legend_handles_labels()
lines2, labels2 = ax2.get_legend_handles_labels()
ax1.legend(lines1 + lines2, labels1 + labels2, loc='upper left')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, ax1 = plt.subplots(figsize=($figWidth, $figHeight))
x = np.arange(len($categories))
bottom = np.zeros(len($categories))
for i, (s, v) in enumerate(zip($series, $barValues)):
    ax1.bar(x, v, bottom=bottom, label=s, color=$colors[i % len($colors)], edgecolor='white', linewidth=0.5)
    bottom += np.array(v)
ax1.set_xlabel($xLabel)
ax1.set_ylabel($labels[0] if $labels else 'Value')
ax2 = ax1.twinx()
line_label = $labels[1] if len($labels) > 1 else 'Trend'
ax2.plot(x, $lineValues, color='black', linewidth=2.5, marker='o', markersize=5, label=line_label)
ax2.set_ylabel(line_label)
ax1.set_xticks(x)
ax1.set_xticklabels($categories, rotation=$xRotation)
fig.suptitle($title)
lines1, labels1 = ax1.get_legend_handles_labels()
lines2, labels2 = ax2.get_legend_handles_labels()
ax1.legend(lines1 + lines2, labels1 + labels2, loc='upper left')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

n_series = len($series)
cols = $cols if $cols else min(3, n_series)
rows = int(np.ceil(n_series / cols))
fig, axes = plt.subplots(rows, cols, figsize=($figWidth, 4 * rows), sharex=True, sharey=True)
if rows * cols == 1:
    axes = np.array([[axes]])
elif rows == 1:
    axes = axes.reshape(1, -1)
elif cols == 1:
    axes = axes.reshape(-1, 1)
for i, (s, v) in enumerate(zip($series, $values)):
    r_idx, c_idx = divmod(i, cols)
    ax = axes[r_idx][c_idx]
    ax.plot($categories, v, color=$colors[i % len($colors)], linewidth=2)
    ax.set_title(s, fontsize=10)
    ax.tick_params(axis='x', rotation=45)
    ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
    ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
for i in range(n_series, rows * cols):
    r_idx, c_idx = divmod(i, cols)
    axes[r_idx][c_idx].set_visible(False)
fig.suptitle($title, fontsize=14)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig($outputPath, dpi=$dpi, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()
